faqs.question: How much does mosquito control cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our mosquito control services in Kearny range from $125 to $325 depending on the size of your property and the treatment frequency needed. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages for continuous protection throughout mosquito season.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule mosquito treatments in Kearny?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection in Kearny, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season (May through September). Properties near the Passaic River or Kearny Marsh may benefit from more frequent treatments due to higher mosquito activity in these areas.

faqs.question: Are your mosquito control products safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and for about 30 minutes afterward, after which the treated areas are completely safe to enjoy.
